name: @magic-spells/puzzle
description: SPA-first JavaScript framework — single-file .pzl components, reactive data() components, Go + esbuild compiler

scripts.build:example-modules: go run ./compiler/cmd/pzlc --mode component examples/todos/app/components/TodoItem.pzl tests/fixtures/todos-compiled/TodoItem.compiled.js && go run ./compiler/cmd/pzlc --mode view examples/todos/app/views/Home.pzl tests/fixtures/todos-compiled/Home.compiled.js && go run ./compiler/cmd/pzlc --mode layout examples/todos/app/layouts/Default.pzl tests/fixtures/todos-compiled/Default.compiled.js
scripts.build:blog: go run ./compiler/cmd/puzzle build examples/blog --mode development && node -e "const fs=require('fs');['examples/blog/dist/app.js','examples/blog/dist/index.html','examples/blog/dist/styles.css','examples/blog/dist/api/posts.json'].map(f=>fs.accessSync(f))"
scripts.build:slot-forwarding: go run ./compiler/cmd/pzlc --mode component tests/fixtures/slot-forwarding/Card.pzl tests/fixtures/slot-forwarding/Card.compiled.js && go run ./compiler/cmd/pzlc --mode layout tests/fixtures/slot-forwarding/WrappedLayout.pzl tests/fixtures/slot-forwarding/WrappedLayout.compiled.js
scripts.build:grimoire: go run ./compiler/cmd/puzzle build examples/grimoire --mode development && node -e "const fs=require('fs');['examples/grimoire/dist/app.js','examples/grimoire/dist/index.html','examples/grimoire/dist/styles.css'].map(f=>fs.accessSync(f))"
scripts.build:typed-todos: go run ./compiler/cmd/puzzle build examples/typed-todos --mode development && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const s=fs.readFileSync('examples/typed-todos/dist/app.js','utf8');['examples/typed-todos/dist/app.js','examples/typed-todos/dist/index.html','examples/typed-todos/dist/styles.css'].map(f=>fs.accessSync(f));if(/\binterface\b|: TodoRecord|import type/.test(s)){throw new Error('typed-todos bundle still contains TypeScript syntax')}"
scripts.pretest: npm run build:example-modules && npm run build:blog && npm run build:grimoire && npm run build:typed-todos && npm run build:virtual-scroll && npm run build:slot-forwarding
